name: BDE Score
description: Multi-factor quantitative stock analysis for US, HK, and CN A-share markets. Transparent 0-100 composite scores covering momentum, volatility, value, and quality factors. EU AI Act Art.50 compliant with x402 micropayment support.

authentication.description: API Key required. Free tier: 3 queries/day, 10 req/min. x402 micropayment: $0.01/query USDC on Base.

tools.name: get_bde_score
tools.description: Get BDE Score composite analysis for all stocks in a market (US/HK/CN)

tools.name: get_stock_analysis
tools.description: Get detailed BDE multi-factor analysis for a specific stock symbol

tools.name: get_multi_market_comparison
tools.description: Compare the same company's BDE scores across US, HK, and CN markets

tools.name: get_stock_screener
tools.description: Screen stocks by minimum BDE score threshold

tools.name: get_sector_analysis
tools.description: Get sector-level BDE analysis and rankings

tools.name: get_esg_analysis
tools.description: Get ESG analysis derived from quantitative factors
